PackList.title: Teddy Bear Roses
positive_prompts:
CRITICAL – IDENTITY LOCK (MANDATORY): Use attached photo as ONLY facial reference. Preserve exact facial structure, eye shape, eye color, eyebrows, nose, lips, lip shape, jawline, chin, skin texture, facial proportions. No beautification, no reshaping, no smoothing.

CORE SUBJECT & COMPOSITION: Full-body studio portrait of stunning woman with oval face shape and radiant porcelain skin, standing gracefully and smiling. From side of frame, giant fluffy cream-colored teddy bear enters scene and gently leans toward her, presenting massive dense bouquet of deep red and soft pink roses into her hands. Woman receives bouquet with warm joyful smile in her hands and remains standing straight. Both must stand still at once place till last frame. Floor-length shimmering crimson silk gown with high thigh-slit.

FACIAL & EYE DETAILS: Large almond-shaped clear eyes matching original eye color with high-definition iris textures. Fine individual dark eyelashes and perfectly groomed natural arched eyebrows matching original color. Soft warm glint in pupils reflecting studio softboxes. Symmetrical warm smile showing natural white teeth. Softly contoured cheekbones with subtle rosy glow. Thin well-defined lips with natural pink tint and slight satin sheen matching original lip shape exactly.

HAIR: Voluminous side-parted hair matching original hair color styled in soft polished Hollywood waves draping over shoulder.

ENVIRONMENT & LIGHTING: Minimalist high-key cream studio backdrop with floating red paper hearts. Glass tiered stand to side holds delicate pastel macarons and cupcakes. Floor scattered with realistic red rose petals. Professional three-point lighting. Soft wrapping key light eliminating harsh shadows on face while maintaining depth and texture in crimson silk dress.

9:16 vertical, ultra-high-resolution, hyper-realistic photography, studio fashion portrait, 8K detail, sharp focus, natural skin texture, romantic cinematic Valentine's Day atmosphere, luxury editorial photography aesthetic.

Use attached input image from frame 0. Giant teddy bear enters smoothly from side presenting massive rose bouquet. Woman remains standing in place with warm joyful smile, receives bouquet with gentle natural hand movements. Both woman and teddy bear stand still after presentation. Subtle natural breathing movements only. Rose petals remain on floor. Soft ambient movements of floating hearts in background. Identity preserved throughout all frames. Smooth continuous video with no walking or position changes.

Combine both prompts to create seamless romantic Valentine video of woman receiving rose bouquet from giant teddy bear in elegant studio setting, both standing still, preserving facial identity from frame 0 throughout entire video.

PackList.title: Pasta Joy

Other hand rests gently on edge of white ceramic plate filled with spaghetti bolognese, topped with fresh basil leaves and grated parmesan.

Eyes tightly closed in happy squint (u-shaped arc), depicted by thick clean black lines with delicate upturned eyelashes at outer corners. Thin dark brown eyebrows arched high in delight. Small simple button nose. Wide joyful open mouth showing clean white upper row of teeth.

HAIR: Rich chocolate brown, styled in voluminous shoulder-length wavy bob with deep side part. Smooth cel-shading with bright golden-tan highlights following curve of waves, glossy bouncy texture.

OUTFIT: Beige ribbed turtleneck sweater with fine vertical lines.

SETTING: Softly blurred upscale Italian restaurant with warm wooden wall paneling, framed picture, golden ambient lighting from wall sconces. Warm inviting color palette dominated by creams, browns, soft ambers.

9:16 vertical, modern manhwa/webtoon style, clean-line finish, warm color grading, professional digital illustration, 8K quality.

Use attached input image from frame 0. Subject maintains joyful eating expression with slight natural movements - gentle head tilt, slight eye squint variation, natural breathing. Fork and pasta strands move slightly with eating motion. Smooth continuous animation preserving caricature style and identity throughout all frames.

PackList.title: Restore Photo
positive_prompts:
Restore and colorize an old photo of {subject} from {era/decade}. 
Colorize with muted, era-appropriate tones: slightly desaturated colors, gentle sepia undertone, authentic fabric hues, natural but less vivid skin tones. Avoid modern over-saturation.

Preserve the original composition, facial identity, natural skin texture, fine wrinkles, and historical clothing details. 
Remove dust, scratches, stains, folds, and film defects; carefully deblur while avoiding artificial smoothness. 

Reconstruct and colorize the background consistent with the original context: 
- Keep environmental cues (e.g., snow for winter skiing, yellowed grass for old summer fields, fog for wartime, indoor furniture for studio photos). 
- Ensure weather, season, and setting match the clothing, activity, and historical context of the photo. 

Balance exposure and white balance while keeping the antique atmosphere. 
Maintain soft contrast with slight fade, add very subtle sepia warmth. 
Lighting: soft diffuse daylight, slightly dim as in vintage photography. 
Sharpness: moderate and organic, add light film grain for authenticity. 

Output as a high-resolution, photorealistic restored photograph with a nostalgic, historically accurate look true to its era.
Mood: timeless, authentic, gentle.
PackList.negative_prompt:
extra hands, missing bouquet, deformed fingers, distorted flowers, duplicate rings, warped faces, unnatural smile, asymmetrical eyes,  
partner’s hand or arm missing, stiff or awkward pose, messy background, altered background, text, watermark, logo,  
low resolution, motion blur, harsh lighting, overexposed highlights, underexposed shadows, cheap wrapping, wilted petals

PackList.title: Stylish Girl
positive_prompts:
Complete the subject’s body while keeping the original posture and facial features unchanged from the uploaded photo. Turn the subject into a hyper-realistic 1/7 scale PVC collectible figure with crisp molding, clean paint lines, matte skin with subtle plastic specular highlights. Place the figure on a clear round acrylic display base with a clear vertical support rod on a light wooden desk with a black keyboard, coiled headphone, scattered papers/cables. Behind it, show a thin-bezel monitor running a 3D modeling UI that displays the same character as a bright white/cyan wireframe on a dark viewport. To the right, add a closed matte product box whose front shows glossy full-color artwork of the same character on a soft pastel graphic background.
The figure, the box artwork, and the on-screen wireframe must be identical in pose, outfit, hairstyle, and proportions. Lighting: soft overhead key + gentle rim, neutral daylight; realistic contact shadow and faint reflection on the acrylic base. Framing: full-body, desk-level camera, 50–70 mm lens, shallow depth of field with the figure tack-sharp. Style: professional studio product photo, ultra-detailed, 8K photorealism; physical PVC figure photographed realistically.

PackList.title: Driver Window
positive_prompts:
Image-to-image with two inputs:
{IMAGE_A} = driver (man)       | Person A
{IMAGE_B} = passenger (woman)  | Person B
(Optional outfit ref) {DRESS_REF} = the silver sequin gown photo you provided.

Identity lock (both):
Preserve each person’s exact face, hairstyle, skin tone, body proportions, and expression style (no warping/beautifying/identity change).

Wardrobe (override):
• Person A (man/driver): tailored dark suit (black/charcoal/navy), white dress shirt; polished formal look.
• Person B (woman/passenger): **silver sequin evening gown exactly like {DRESS_REF}** —
  thin spaghetti straps, V-neckline, fitted bodice, shimmering metallic sequins, natural drape.
  Subtle jewelry only (small earrings/bracelet). Do NOT add logos or extra accessories.

Scene & composition:
Red classic convertible (top down) at night in downtown. Neon/billboards present but soft and subdued.
Waist-up framing from slightly above the passenger-side window; interior clearly visible.
Driver hands on wheel, calm confident glance toward camera. Passenger slightly turned toward camera, elegant relaxed expression.

Lighting — Flash First:
On-camera flash aimed at both faces, near lens axis, **soft-diffused**.
Subjects **+1.0 to +1.5 EV** brighter than ambient; background **−1.5 to −2.0 EV** darker than subjects.
Clean catchlights in both eyes; crisp frontal highlights on skin, hair, sequins/jewelry, leather, and chrome.
Shadows fall backward/downward onto seats/door with soft edges (no harsh cut).
Flash CCT ≈ **5200K** (neutral warm-white) balanced against cooler city ambience.

Ambient & grade:
City lights kept subtle/dim (warm tungsten yellows + cool blue billboards) with only gentle color spill on car edges.
Deep blacks, smooth highlight roll-off; slight vignette; subtle fine film grain.
Preserve natural skin tones under flash; avoid blown hotspots and waxy smoothing.

Materials & micro-detail:
Polished red paint shows realistic specular streaks from flash; soft reflections on windshield rim and chrome.
Leather texture, fabric weave, and jewelry reflections visible but not exaggerated.
Background bokeh present but muted to keep attention on the couple.

Rules:
Photorealistic; no text, logos, or brand marks. Keep proportions natural; maintain the exposure ratio and color-temperature balance above.

PackList.title: Birthday Gentleman
positive_prompts:
One-person IMAGE-TO-IMAGE. Input: {PERSON_INPUT}  Preserve the person exact identity, facial features, skin tone, hairstyle direction, and body proportions — do NOT change her/his face, and do NOT add extra people. The person must remain clearly recognizable as the girl from the input.

Identity lock: match the source exactly — face, hairstyle, skin tone, body proportions, head angle, and expression. No beautifying or alterations.

Wardrobe (match reference precisely):
- Burgundy pinstripe suit (two-piece) with black and white thin stripes.
- White dress shirt.
- Black patterned tie.
- Black leather dress shoes with slight shine.
- Wristwatch on left wrist.
- No logos or text.

Scene & background:
- Warm caramel or tan studio backdrop.
- “HAPPY BIRTHDAY” paper banner hanging behind.
- White table with birthday cake, candles, bouquet of red and cream roses, and a few scattered cups.
- Black balloons around and on the floor.
- Light confetti on floor; no additional props.

Pose & composition:
- Subject sits on the floor directly in front of the table.
- **Legs:** left leg extended forward (heel on floor), right leg bent with knee up (or vice versa).
- **Arms/Hands:** forearms resting casually across the raised knee or lightly crossed; relaxed shoulders.
- Torso slightly angled to camera; smiling brightly toward the camera.
- Three-quarter framing to include balloons on floor and table setup; camera at eye level with subject’s face.

Lighting:
- Studio setup with soft key light from camera-left, gentle fill from front-right.
- Balanced exposure; natural highlights on face, suit, and balloons.
- Warm tone grading with cinematic depth; soft, even contrast.

Camera & grading:
- 50mm full-frame lens, f/5.6 for crisp detail and controlled depth.
- True-to-life color palette; natural skin tones.
- Slight matte finish with fine grain; keep texture realistic and rich.
- Photorealistic, high resolution.
- No text, watermark, or extra people.

PackList.title: Golden Confidence
positive_prompts:
One-person IMAGE-TO-IMAGE. Input: {PERSON_INPUT}.  Preserve the person exact identity, facial features, skin tone, hairstyle direction, and body proportions — do NOT change her/his face, and do NOT add extra people. The person must remain clearly recognizable as the girl from the input.

Identity lock: match the source exactly (face, hairstyle, skin tone, body proportions, head angle, expression). No beautifying or face reshaping.

Wardrobe (match reference):
- Charcoal gray pinstripe suit with broad shoulders, relaxed trousers.
- Light beige open-collar dress shirt (no tie).
- No logos or text.

Scene:
- Seamless deep wine-red studio backdrop.
- Floating metallic gold confetti, varied sizes and depth; do not cover the eyes.

Pose & framing:
- Casual confidence; one hand in pocket, the other relaxed near waist/hip.
- Chin slightly raised; neutral or subtle confident look to camera.
- Mid-thigh to head framing, centered.

Lighting (natural, non-plastic):
- Large diffused key (softbox) 45° camera-left, feathered across the face.
- Gentle fill from camera-right at 1.5–2 stops under key (keep natural contrast).
- Very subtle rim for edge separation only; avoid hot highlights on skin.
- Preserve micro-texture (pores, fine facial hair); no skin smoothing.

Camera & grade:
- 35mm full-frame, ~f/5.6 for crisp detail without flattening.
- True-to-life color; soft contrast; smooth highlight roll-off.
- Filmic look with fine, subtle grain; matte skin finish (no shine).
- Photorealistic, high resolution.

Quality rules:
- Do not add text, numbers, watermarks, or extra people/props.
- Keep suit fabric natural (matte wool pinstripe).
PackList.negative_prompt:
extra hands, missing bouquet, deformed fingers, distorted flowers, duplicate rings, warped faces, unnatural smile, asymmetrical eyes,  
partner’s hand or arm missing, stiff or awkward pose, messy background, altered background, text, watermark, logo,  
low resolution, motion blur, harsh lighting, overexposed highlights, underexposed shadows, cheap wrapping, wilted petals

PackList.title: Christmas Couple Polaroid
positive_prompts:
Using the input photo(s), create a retro Polaroid-style collage containing TWO photos of the SAME couple.

Preserve both people’s exact identities, facial features, skin tones, hairstyles, and body proportions — do NOT change their faces, and do NOT add or remove people. There must be exactly two people.
OUTFITS (both photos):

They are both wearing matching red Christmas sweaters with white reindeer and snowflake patterns, cozy knit texture, long sleeves, casual holiday vibe.
TOP PHOTO — REQUIRED:

• The couple stands close together, shoulder to shoulder.

• The boy has an arm around the girl.

• The girl leans her head gently on his shoulder with a happy, relaxed smile.

• Bright flash lighting.

• Background: shiny silver tinsel curtains.
BOTTOM PHOTO — REQUIRED:

• The couple is very close, facing each other.

• They are sharing a kiss on the lips.

• Hands gently touching or holding each other’s sweater near the chest.

• Background: colorful Christmas tree lights and dark surroundings.
LIGHTING (BOTH PHOTOS):

• Bright on-camera flash illuminating the couple clearly.

• Background darker and less prominent.

• Same lighting mood in both images.
LAYOUT:

• One Polaroid frame with a clean white border.

• Two stacked photos (top above, bottom below).

• No text, no date, no handwriting.
STYLE & MOOD:

• Intimate, cozy, candid Christmas vibe.

• Slight 90s film grain.

• Photorealistic, natural colors, no beauty-filter smoothing.
RULES:

• Exactly two people.

• No added people.

• No logos, no watermarks.

• Keep everything realistic and true to their identities.

PackList.title: Winter Cheers
positive_prompts:
Generate an image using the two people as the exact identity references. The final image must include exactly those same two people, and each person must match their original face exactly (identity, hairstyle, skin tone, age, facial proportions, head shape, body proportions — giống ảnh gốc). No beautification, no facial reshaping, no skin smoothing, no makeup changes.

Exact pose & framing (match reference): Full-body shot, eye-level camera, couple centered, standing side-by-side with similar spacing and scale as the reference. Both raise both arms high and wide in a joyful V-shape, palms open, elbows slightly bent, celebrating the snowfall. Their heads tilt upward toward the sky, smiling/laughing with natural expressions. Keep the same relative distances between them, same body scale, and the same framing with boots visible in the snow.

Wardrobe (match reference): Both wear long black winter overcoats and vivid bright-red knitted scarves with visible fringes. Dark pants/leggings and dark winter boots. Natural fabric folds and realistic textures.

Background & objects (match reference layout): Bright daytime snowy mountain setting with large snow-covered mountains filling the upper background. Snow-covered evergreen trees on both sides. A diagonal strand of festive string lights behind them (running across the mid-background). Two snowmen positioned like the reference: one behind the couple near center, and one slightly behind to the side. A few wrapped gift boxes near the lower-left by the tree. Clean, realistic winter scene with no extra people.

Snowfall (match reference): Visible falling snow throughout the frame with a few larger foreground flakes for depth, but do not obscure faces.

Lighting & realism: Crisp natural daylight, bright but not overexposed, soft realistic shadows, high resolution, sharp faces, accurate skin texture, no plastic smoothing. No text, no logos, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no distortions.

PackList.title: 3-panel-vertical
positive_prompts:
Generate a photorealistic 3-panel vertical split image (three tall panels side-by-side, equal width) using the two people as the exact identity references. The final image must include exactly those same two people, and each person must match their original face exactly (identity, hairstyle, skin tone, age, facial proportions, head shape, body proportions — giống ảnh gốc). No beautification, no facial reshaping, no skin smoothing.

Global scene (consistent across all 3 panels): A snowy pine forest in winter with dense evergreen trees heavily covered in snow, soft overcast daylight, shallow depth of field, gentle falling snowflakes (some larger foreground flakes for depth but never covering faces). No extra people, no text, no logos, no watermarks.

Wardrobe (consistent): Both wear long dark/black winter coats and thick cream/ivory knitted scarves wrapped around the neck. Dark pants and winter boots. Realistic fabric texture and folds.

Layout requirement: Create one single image composed of three vertical panels with subtle thin separators. Each panel is a different crop/shot from the same winter photoshoot, matching the reference collage style.

Panel-specific compositions & poses:

Left panel (close-up): Tight close-up from chest-up. Theyfaces each other very closely, eyes closed, foreheads touching gently. Soft calm smiles. Hands lightly holding each other at the waist/arms. Intimate, serene.

Middle panel (full-body): Full-body shot, centered. They embraces in the snowy path. Foreheads touching, eyes closed, both arms around each other’s waist/back. Boots visible, standing on fresh snow.

Right panel (medium shot): Medium shot (waist-up). They faces each other with warm smiles, eyes open, slightly leaning in as if about to kiss. Hands around each other’s waist/arms. Keep it romantic but tasteful.

Quality constraints: Photorealistic, high resolution, sharp faces, natural color. No duplicated limbs, no distorted hands/feet, no face warping. Ensure both people appear clearly in all three panels.

PackList.title: Winter Halo
positive_prompts:
Generate an image using the uploaded input photo as the identity reference. The output must match the original/source image exactly (identity, hairstyle, skin tone, face shape, head angle, body proportions ). No beautification, no facial reshaping, no skin smoothing, keep natural skin texture.

Create a cinematic winter “angel” portrait at night in a snowy pine forest. Environment: tall evergreen trees heavily covered in snow, dark moody night sky with soft clouds, gentle snowfall with a few larger foreground flakes for depth (do not cover the face). Pose: the subject is kneeling on fresh snow with a calm, dreamy expression, looking slightly upward, hands resting softly on their lap. Add large, realistic white feather angel wings attached naturally to the back (anatomically plausible connection, symmetrical, detailed feathers, soft edges, no clipping into clothing).

Outfit (tasteful, non-revealing): a modest elegant white winter-angel dress—long sleeves, opaque fabric with subtle lace texture, knee-length or longer; optional soft white capelet or shawl for warmth; opaque white tights; no lingerie, no corset lingerie styling, no garters, no visible underwear, no excessive cleavage. Keep the look elegant and age-appropriate.

Lighting & camera: cinematic moonlit key light from above/front with soft fill, gentle highlights on hair and wings, realistic shadows on snow. Eye-level portrait framing (upper body to knees visible), shallow depth of field, sharp eyes and face, high resolution, natural color grading.

Strict constraints: no text/captions, no logos, no watermarks, no extra people, no duplicated limbs, no deformed hands, no wing artifacts, no halo glow overload, no fantasy cartoon style—photorealistic o

PackList.title: Police Intake
positive_prompts:
Generate an image using the uploaded input photo as the identity reference. The subject in the final image must match the input subject exactly (same face/identity, skin tone, facial proportions, hairline, hairstyle/color, age cues, and natural skin texture). No beautification, no facial restructuring, no “AI model” look.

A photorealistic police station interior with beige walls, white drop-ceiling and fluorescent light panels, gray floor. Behind the subject, a blue wall sign reads “POLICE STATION NEW YORK.” Include desks with stacks of paperwork/folders and a barred gray door in the mid-background suggesting a detention area.

Pose & wardrobe: the subject stands centered in the foreground, facing the camera, neutral expression, shoulders relaxed. Outfit is a plain heather-gray t-shirt and black pants. The subject’s hands are cuffed in front at waist level (standard metal handcuffs), arms relaxed close to the body.

Other people: on the left foreground edge, include a tactical police officer partially in frame (helmet, black vest), with one black-gloved hand holding the subject’s upper arm. In the background right, include another uniformed officer standing near the wall, slightly out of focus. Keep proportions realistic and do not add extra people.

Camera & rendering: eye-level, medium-full body framing (head to mid-thigh), sharp focus on the subject’s face, slightly softer background depth of field, neutral indoor color balance, clean overhead fluorescent lighting.

PackList.title: I made it!
positive_prompts:
Generate an image using the uploaded photo as the subject. The subject in the final image must match the original/source image exactly (same identity, facial features, facial proportions, hairstyle, skin tone, head angle, and body proportions). No face reshaping, no beauty-filter smoothing, no changing age cues.

Create a photorealistic, bold “diamond flex” close-up selfie with a dome / vaulted-lens camera look:

Camera (critical): Use an ultra-wide “dome” lens effect (0.5x style), like shooting through a curved glass/vaulted lens. Strong barrel distortion and curved edges so the center feels slightly bulged/rounded, while the edges curve subtly. Keep distortion natural and realistic (not cartoon).

Pose & framing: Extreme close-up. The subject’s face fills most of the frame, leaning very close to the camera. The subject is smiling wide with teeth very close to the lens. One forearm is raised and bent in front of the chest with a clenched fist near the chin, bringing the wristwatch extremely close to the camera (dominant foreground).

Teeth: Add a realistic diamond grill covering the visible teeth (clean, high-end, individually set stones, not cartoonish).

Watch: A luxury silver/white watch with a diamond bezel and diamond bracelet. The watch must be sharp, crisp, and readable, with bright starburst sparkle highlights on the bezel and bracelet.

Focus: Keep BOTH the watch and the subject’s teeth/eyes sharply in focus (focus-stacked / deep-focus feel). No blur on the watch.

Styling: Glam nightlife aesthetic. A fluffy pink faux-fur coat/jacket, chunky gold chain necklace. 

Background: Dark black backdrop with vivid neon ring/arc lights behind the head (pink/red and purple arcs), soft glow but no haze.

Lighting: Strong front flash / beauty light for punchy specular highlights on skin, grill, and watch; subtle neon rim light from behind. High contrast, crisp, hyper-realistic detail.

PackList.title: Iced Burst
positive_prompts:
Generate an image using two uploaded photos as the subjects. In the final image, the man must match one uploaded person exactly and the woman must match the other uploaded person exactly (same identity, facial features, facial proportions, hairstyle, skin tone, head angle, and body proportions for each). Do not swap identities. No beautification, no face reshaping, no changing age cues.

Create a photorealistic “bust down” club selfie like the example:

Camera & framing (critical):

Tight selfie, chest-up, phone front-camera feel.

Slight ultra-wide phone look with mild barrel distortion (natural).

Both faces very close to the lens, filling the frame, leaning in cheek-to-cheek.

Pose & expression (critical):

Woman on camera-left: big excited smile with tongue slightly out, eyes toward the lens.

Man on camera-right: big smile showing teeth, eyes toward the lens.

Both raise one fist near the cheek/jawline in a flex pose to show jewelry (rings + watch visible).

Jewelry / “bust down” styling (critical):

Add luxury iced-out watches (diamond bezel + iced-out bracelet) clearly visible (at least one on the woman; ideally both).

Add multiple shiny rings on fingers (iced-out look).

Add a subtle diamond chain necklace on the man.

Add 2–3 crisp starburst sparkle highlights on the watches/rings (not excessive).

Lighting & color (critical):

Nightclub lighting with strong blue-violet/purple wash over skin and scene.

On-camera flash feel: punchy glossy highlights on cheeks/forehead + strong specular reflections on jewelry.

High contrast with slight low-light phone grain; keep faces and jewelry sharp.

Background:

Dark club interior, heavily blurred, minimal detail, faint light specks/bokeh.
